## Meeting Purpose

[Knowledge transfer call between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss AI-powered content creation workflows and best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses sophisticated AI workflows with human oversight to produce high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale for Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Their process involves multiple AI models, web scraping, and iterative refinement to generate articles tailored to Strapi's brand voice and technical domain](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Responsible AI content creation can be highly effective for SEO, but low-effort approaches risk penalties](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
  - [Google's AI overviews are impacting click-through rates, requiring strategic adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=2645.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI Content Creation Process

  - [Uses multiple AI workflows for keyword research, title/outline generation, and full article writing](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Incorporates Strapi-specific knowledge bases (site map, docs) for contextual relevance](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Iterative AI self-checking and human editing to ensure quality](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Aims for 70-80% AI-generated with 20-30% human refinement](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

### AI Models and Prompting Techniques

  - [Utilizes various GPT models with different temperature settings for different tasks](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Employs "COSCAR" prompting framework: Context, Objective, Style, Tone, Audience, Response format](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Uses XML/markdown formatting to structure prompts and specify variables](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

### Web Scraping and External Sources

  - [Scrapes top-ranking articles for competitive analysis and context](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [Uses Perplexity API and Google search for relevant citations and external links](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Cautions against abusive scraping practices that may trigger penalties](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)

### SEO Strategy and Google Updates

  - [Balances AI-generated content with human oversight to avoid penalties](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Monitors impact of Google's AI overviews on click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=2645.0)
  - [Emphasizes brand-driven searches and high-quality content to maintain traffic](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=2645.0)

### Ethical Considerations in AI Content

  - [Discusses responsible use of AI vs. low-effort content flooding](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)
  - [Highlights importance of adding genuine value beyond basic AI outputs](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=2349.0)
  - [Notes challenges in balancing efficiency with maintaining content quality](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue refining AI workflows to improve content quality for Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Monitor SEO performance and adapt strategies as needed](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Explore potential for more Strapi-specific content optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussions on advanced AI topics and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/6eEkf-AzisB8MSuGjQ_nJd-_DsB1dixN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
